name: kira-agent-system
description: KIRA: Chief of Staff and AI team orchestrator. A persona-based multi-agent system for Claude Code with 6 analysis modes (Strategic, Tactical, Stakeholder, Enablement, Technical, Governance), specialist agents (LEVI, VERA, THEO, MAX, and more), structured delegation, per-agent memory, and a self-learning feedback loop. Built for AI strategy work in regulated industries.
